## PostCode doesn't accept pull requests

Thanks for wanting to help — but PostCode is **source-available, not open-source**, and I'm not taking code contributions. It keeps the codebase and copyright clean. Nothing personal!

**Please close this PR and open an issue instead:**

- 🐛 [Report a bug](https://github.com/mrtymcln/PostCode/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- ⚡️ [Request a feature](https://github.com/mrtymcln/PostCode/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)

If you've spotted something you'd fix, describe the problem (and the fix you have in mind) in an issue and I'll take it from there.

See [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/mrtymcln/PostCode/blob/master/.github/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [LICENCE](https://github.com/mrtymcln/PostCode/blob/master/LICENCE.txt) for more information.
